summary: CP4 validator passed: Vietnamese topic analysis returns five keyword groups, ambiguity triggers clarification, edits persist to ProductContext, and the UI marker is present.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Topic -> keywords 5 categories
checks.command: POST /api/sessions with "Khach hang nghi gi ve TPBank EVO?"
checks.actual: brand, pain_points, sentiment, behavior, comparison all populated (27 keywords)

checks.name: CHECK-02: Diacritics included
checks.command: POST /api/sessions with "Phan hoi ve dich vu giao hang"
checks.actual: Returned both accented terms like "dịch vụ chậm" and ASCII variants like "dich vu cham"

checks.name: CHECK-05: ProductContext in DB
checks.command: sqlite3 backend/app.db "SELECT context_id, status, keyword_json IS NOT NULL ..."

checks.name: CHECK-06: Prompt caching
checks.actual: Found cache_control type ephemeral in AIClient system prompt
